title: BILINGUAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: BALANCE CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES BILINGUAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health services. Specialties include trauma, prenatal and postpartum depression and anxiety, at-risk adolescents, depression, anxiety, parenting support, acculturation, and immigration issues. 11740 SW Warner Avenue Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on Hispanic and Latinx communities Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 596-2222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 596-2222 Main phone (503) 200-1340 FAX Main phone (503) 596-2222 FAX (503) 200-1340 Referrals Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Care Oregon) and most major health insurance including, Kaiser, Pacific Source, United Healthcare, Blue Cross Blue Shield (BCBS), and Aetna DOCUMENTS: Insurance documents if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: By appointment Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Child Abuse Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Child Sexual Abuse Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Counseling for Children Affected by Domestic Violence * Hispanic/Latino Community Family Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Group Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Individual Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Mental Health Evaluation * Hispanic/Latino Community Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BALANCE CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES
